category_sources: source_facts.description says this provides GObject wrappers for libusb1; official README describes GUsb as a GObject wrapper for libusb1: https://github.com/hughsie/libgusb
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is GUsb: https://github.com/hughsie/libgusb
docs_sources: Official repository README is the best official documentation surface found; repository also contains a docs directory: https://github.com/hughsie/libgusb
